summary.content: Data and ML Platform Engineer with 3+ years designing and operating cloud-native data infrastructure on AWS and Oracle Cloud. Hands-on expertise in pipeline automation, real-time monitoring, GxP compliance, and MLOps. Track record of achieving 99.9% uptime on production systems, reducing pipeline latency by 30-40% through optimization, and building observable, drift-monitored ML platforms that serve business-critical workflows at scale.

categories.name: Cloud / Infra
items: AWS (S3, Glue, Lambda, Athena, Bedrock, SageMaker)

experience.title: Founding Engineer, Data and AI Applications
experience.company: Alphonso AI, Shipley Center for Innovation
bullets: Designed and deployed end-to-end AWS data pipelines (S3, Glue) centralizing behavioral event data; automated feature engineering workflows and implemented Grafana drift monitoring to maintain production model reliability.

Operationalized an AI retrieval system (Dense Vector + BM25, Cross-Encoder reranking) with engagement-scoring instrumentation and real-time performance alerting, achieving 38% improvement in system precision.
Established model observability and continuous feedback loop infrastructure for an early-stage AI platform, enabling rapid iteration and data-driven product decisions pre- and post-launch.

experience.title: Graduate Equity Research Analyst
experience.company: Student Managed Investment Fund, Clarkson University
bullets: Automated financial data extraction pipelines using the SEC EDGAR API and Google Vertex AI, cutting manual research time by 40% and enabling structured downstream data flows for DCF and WACC modeling.
Built Monte Carlo simulation and risk-parity models in Python to stress-test portfolio positions for a $650K fund delivering 51% total return, outperforming the S&P 500 by 2,600 bps.
Architected Tableau dashboards with integrated LLM-driven reporting, reducing analytical overhead for a team of 8 research analysts.

experience.title: Data Science and ML Consultant
bullets: Refactored PySpark ETL scripts processing 1M+ cross-channel events (GA4, CRM); implemented AWS Glue partition pruning to reduce pipeline latency by 30%, directly accelerating model training and reporting cycles.
Deployed CausalML uplift models and A/B testing infrastructure with Power Analysis-based sample sizing on AWS, validating a 12% revenue-per-ticket improvement with statistical rigor.
Engineered behavioral analytics pipelines from raw event ingestion to production model serving, processing multi-source data at scale with automated quality checks.

experience.title: Business Data Analyst
bullets: Deployed GxP-compliant ML workflows on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure with real-time alerting, maintaining 99.9% uptime for mission-critical inventory-monitoring pipelines across 1,500+ SKUs.
Productionized a hybrid demand-forecasting model (Prophet + SARIMAX) processing approximately 800K daily Oracle Fusion ERP transactions, achieving 15% MAPE improvement.
Automated procurement KPI reporting pipelines via Oracle Analytics Cloud dashboards, freeing 12+ engineering hours per week previously spent on manual data preparation.

experience.title: Data Analyst
bullets: Engineered scalable PySpark and Databricks data ingestion pipelines processing 10M+ rows from 30+ heterogeneous sources, reducing data latency by 40% and improving pipeline reliability.
Designed and maintained Power BI reporting infrastructure for 10+ stakeholders, enabling self-serve access to campaign performance data for multi-million-dollar investment decisions.
Applied regression modeling and sampling frameworks to generate consumer insights for clients across Middle East and Central Africa markets.
